specializations: Pea protein matrices for delivery systems
product_highlights: KLEPTOSE® cyclodextrins — HP-β-CD, HP-γ-CD for inclusion complex delivery of hydrophobic actives
ROQUETTE Pea Protein matrices — natural protein-based microencapsulation carrier
PEARLITOL® — mannitol excipients for active ingredient stabilization and delivery
GLUCIDEX® — dextrin-based spray-dried encapsulation systems for volatile actives
notes: Roquette is a world-leading plant-based ingredient manufacturer with an exceptional portfolio of cyclodextrin and starch-based delivery systems for cosmetic and pharmaceutical applications. Their KLEPTOSE® cyclodextrin series, including hydroxypropyl-beta-cyclodextrin (HP-β-CD), enables the inclusion complexation of hydrophobic actives to enhance solubility, stability, and bioavailability in aqueous formulations. As a sustainable, plant-derived encapsulation partner with strong COSMOS and Ecocert credentials, Roquette is an essential SKIN-TWIN reference for clean-label delivery system formulation.
